tags.note:toilets:hands_drying: Hand dryer hidden behind open door, at least in men’s room.

tags.note: locals know the security code on the locks

tags.fixme: According to the signs, the hours depend on the seasons: "Spring & Summer" or "Fall & Winter". What are the definitions of those seasons? The current opening hours are based on standard 3-month seasons.

tags.description: NPS composting latrine; has keycode on handle but was open on a sunday evening.

tags.opening_hours: Mar-Aug: 08:00-20:00+ open "Summer hours"; Sep-Jan: 08:00-17:30+ open "Winter hours"
tags.wheelchair:description: Stalls too narrow and two steps before entrance

tags.note: Inside the building on the 2nd floor.
Next to the spiral stairwell leading to Patriot House

tags.note:access: In the paid area of BART

tags.description: These are below the stairs and accessible through a set of doors at street level.

tags.note:access: Toilets locked, but an employee unlocked the toilets for a member of general public
Passing through a City Hall checkpoint is necessary to reach this toilet.

tags.opening_hours: Jan-Mar Mo-Su 08:00-17:30; Apr-Sep Mo-Su 08:00-20:00; Oct-Dec Mo-Su 08:00-17:30

tags.description: open only during baseball games. However, during a game on 2023-05-06 these were locked.

tags.fixme: Add opening hours (this was closed when I surveyed it)

tags.description: Restrooms are on the far side of the basketball court.

tags.fixme: Who is allowed to use this?
